text.message: Just monster production and great ports
I went for production all I had
I thought you would want ows
But everyone has a game here i think
I feel I have the worst one lol
I never know how to do that
I have brick for you man
I mean im trying to work with the table here
Willing to trade brick all day
Can i get that wheat though
Willing to help you settle on your turn
If we dont feed each other we are just losing here
couldn't give you my only grain
You could i have a lot of cards i could have given you 4:1 on your turn
Now i have 10 cards and no action
So we just watch black steamroll
I think now that blue has a city  and option for road and army I am not in the lead
Need as well to fight army against crazy ows with army
Just saying I did well at start but now watch out from blue
Can you sling me a sheep though
All wood and brick jn hand
Idk if you were extremely lucky or extremely unlucky lol
